system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'

raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: Multi-asset cal request — 6 instruments, on-site, ISO 17025 / A2LA", "body": "Dear Tessera Semiconductor Metrology Team,

Thank you for your calibration request. We have logged six on-site annual calibration work orders for your Hsinchu Foundry-4 metrology bay, all to be delivered under ISO/IEC 17025 with A2LA traceability and including as-found data, scheduled within a single one-week on-site visit window.

Work orders created:
- WO-3-14165 — KS-UXR-441288 (UXR0334A, Real-Time Scope)
- WO-3-22280 — KS-PNAX-330917 (N5247B, PNA-X 67 GHz VNA)
- WO-3-40495 — KS-MXA-882103 (N9020B, MXA Signal Analyzer)
- WO-3-88907 — KS-VXG-118822 (M9384B, VXG Vector Signal Generator)
- WO-3-83563 — KS-BERT-998811 (M8040A, 64 GBaud BERT)
- WO-3-95181 — KS-SMU-771044 (B2902B, Precision SMU)

Each work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA. Our scheduling coordinator will then contact you to confirm the on-site visit window and coordinate site-access logistics.

If you have a preferred completion date, PO reference, or contract number you would like associated with these work orders, please share them and we will update the records accordingly.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps"}

parsed.subject: Re: Multi-asset cal request — 6 instruments, on-site, ISO 17025 / A2LA
parsed.body:
Dear Tessera Semiconductor Metrology Team,

Thank you for your calibration request. We have logged six on-site annual calibration work orders for your Hsinchu Foundry-4 metrology bay, all to be delivered under ISO/IEC 17025 with A2LA traceability and including as-found data, scheduled within a single one-week on-site visit window.

Work orders created:
- WO-3-14165 — KS-UXR-441288 (UXR0334A, Real-Time Scope)
- WO-3-22280 — KS-PNAX-330917 (N5247B, PNA-X 67 GHz VNA)
- WO-3-40495 — KS-MXA-882103 (N9020B, MXA Signal Analyzer)
- WO-3-88907 — KS-VXG-118822 (M9384B, VXG Vector Signal Generator)
- WO-3-83563 — KS-BERT-998811 (M8040A, 64 GBaud BERT)
- WO-3-95181 — KS-SMU-771044 (B2902B, Precision SMU)

Each work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA. Our scheduling coordinator will then contact you to confirm the on-site visit window and coordinate site-access logistics.

If you have a preferred completion date, PO reference, or contract number you would like associated with these work orders, please share them and we will update the records accordingly.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps
